danger_signals.visual_form: Headcrabs, bullsquids, vortigaunts, headcrab zombies with distinct grotesque silhouettes and movement patterns
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental contamination; resonance cascade aftermath; immediate physical threat

danger_signals.visual_form: Distinct hostile human soldiers with tactical gear; differentiated from security guards through uniform/movement
danger_signals.meaning: Government cover-up operation; higher-tier threat; player is hunted target

danger_signals.visual_form: U.S. federal soldiers in military gear; visible weaponry and cohesive squad formations
danger_signals.meaning: Official military response; facility lockdown; indiscriminate hostility (kill both humans and aliens)

danger_signals.visual_form: Broken walls, collapsed sections, exposed infrastructure after resonance cascade
danger_signals.meaning: Catastrophic event occurred; environmental hazards present; containment failure

danger_signals.visual_form: Military aircraft visible in 'Surface Tension' chapter
danger_signals.meaning: Escalated military response; aerial bombardment threat; government commitment to cover-up

danger_signals.visual_form: Automated defensive turret systems encountered in facility
danger_signals.meaning: Active facility defenses; potential friendly-fire threat; zone control

safety_signals.visual_form: Uniformed facility security personnel; distinct from Marines and Black Ops through appearance and behavior
safety_signals.meaning: Potential allies; facility authority; can assist in reaching new areas and provide plot information

safety_signals.visual_form: Lab-coat wearing NPCs; non-combatant appearance; distinct civilian scientist identity
safety_signals.meaning: Non-hostile; provides guidance, plot exposition, and assistance in navigation; represents pre-incident normalcy

safety_signals.visual_form: Research facility terminal/waypoint; beacon of organized resistance
safety_signals.meaning: Safe haven objective; coordinates counter-alien operation; represents structured response to crisis

safety_signals.visual_form: Hazardous Environment Suit; protective gear worn by player character
safety_signals.meaning: Enhanced survival capability; damage mitigation; transformation to better-equipped state

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Facility insignia; Lambda symbol (associated with Lambda Complex counter-offensive)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Underground research complex architecture; scientific equipment; clean facility sections before damage; containment chambers

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Military insignia; uniform designs differentiating Marine units
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Marines (standard troops); Black Ops assassins (elite cover-up operatives with distinct tactical loadout); attack helicopters (AH-64 units)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Military vehicles; tactical fortifications; combat positions; clean facility sections under military control

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Organic creature designs; xenic biomechanics distinct from Earth fauna
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Headcrabs (parasitic), bullsquids (aggressive fauna), vortigaunts (intelligent aliens), headcrab zombies (parasitized humans)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Xen dimension architecture; organic alien structures; teleportation zones; crystalline alien terrain (end-game)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Clean scientific facility; organized research labs; intact infrastructure; scientists at work; security guards patrolling normally
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs perform routine tasks; no hostile entities; controlled environment; normal facility operations

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Explosions visible; facility damaged; structural collapse; lights flickering or disabled; emergency systems activated
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Scientists panicked; guards alert; teleportation anomalies occurring; aliens spawning through dimensional rifts; chaos spreading

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Military presence increased; barricades erected; facility sections sealed; combat fortifications visible; evidence of firefights
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Marines and Black Ops hunting all entities; indiscriminate elimination protocol; security guards either allied or eliminated; scientists fleeing or in hiding

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Organic alien structures visible; xenic bioforms infesting facility sections; grotesque alien architecture appearing; headcrabs and zombies prevalent
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Alien enemies actively hunting; headcrab parasitism creating zombie soldiers; vortigaunts establishing alien presence; organic corruption visible

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Facility exterior sections accessed; surface terrain visible; rocket test facility; military aerial assets (attack helicopters); landscape altered by conflict
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Helicopter engagement; Military suppression of player; Alien presence extended to surface; elevated military response indicating critical situation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Alien crystalline architecture; gravity anomalies; floating platforms; alien dimension aesthetic; platformer-style jumping challenges
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player acquiring long-jump module for HEV suit; advanced alien intelligence encounters; complex navigation required; physics-defying alien structures

environmental_storytelling.example: Player maintains first-person perspective throughout; story conveyed through scripted sequences during gameplay; seamless chapter transitions communicate narrative flow without interruption

Security guards explain situation through in-game conversation; scientists provide both plot exposition and practical guidance; their demeanor reflects current world state (panicked early, organized later in Lambda Complex)

Resonance cascade damage visible in facility sections; collapsed tunnels, destroyed labs, and active fires communicate severity of incident; progression through damaged areas shows spreading contamination
Military barricades and fortifications show government occupation; alien structures indicate xenic colonization; scientific sections represent pre-disaster normalcy when intact
Headcrabs alone vs. headcrab zombies indicate alien success rate; vortigaunt organization shows intelligent enemy coordination; enemy density reflects contamination spread
Early section contains security guards; mid-game introduces Marines; late-game shows attack helicopters; visual military presence intensity tracks government response escalation

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Patrol routes; respond to player approach with recognition; provide assistance and plot information; fight alongside player against common threats
May be eliminated by aliens; some sections show guard casualties; headcrab parasitism converts some to zombies; visual indicators of failed containment
Flee from danger; seek shelter; provide desperate guidance to player; communicate urgency and fear through demeanor; indicate research team survival efforts
Squad formations; coordinated fire; hostile to all humans (except Black Ops); aggressive patrolling; fortified positions indicate territorial control
Lone operators or small teams; tactical stealth approach; enhanced threat level vs. standard Marines; indicate government prioritization of Gordon Freeman elimination
Aggressive hunting; parasitic attack patterns; indicate early alien adaptation to Earth environment; swarm behavior shows organized invasion
Grotesque movement; higher aggression than base humans; demonstrate successful xenic parasitism; represent worst-case scenario for facility personnel
Organized hunting patterns; complex spatial awareness; indicate higher-order alien intelligence; suggest enemy adaptation and strategy
Aerial bombardment; sustained firepower; indicate government commitment to facility suppression; represent escalated threat level requiring terrain-based evasion

notes: Half-Life employs environmental storytelling and scripted sequences rather than cutscenes to convey world-state continuously. The game communicates faction identity through NPC appearance, behavior, and environmental modifications. Danger signals are primarily visual (creature morphology, military gear, infrastructure damage) rather than abstract. Safety signals emerge from allied NPC presence and objective waypoints (Lambda Complex). World-state progression is tracked through infrastructure condition, NPC behavior shifts, and enemy composition changes. The resonance cascade serves as a world-state pivot point: pre-cascade represents scientific normalcy; post-cascade represents military crisis and alien infestation. Political situation (government cover-up) is communicated through escalating military presence and shift from security guards to Marines to Black Ops assassins. The player's perspective never breaks, forcing meaning to be extracted from environmental cues and NPC interactions.
